description: Test suite for ohos-issue-graphics-cppcrash-analysis skill - analyzing OpenHarmony cppcrash faultlogs to locate native process crash root causes

evals.prompt: 分析这个cppcrash日志文件，定位崩溃根因
evals.expected_output: Skill should trigger and begin cppcrash analysis workflow

assertions.evidence: Skill is invoked for cppcrash analysis request

evals.prompt: 定位native崩溃原因，进程render_service发生了SIGSEGV
evals.expected_output: Skill should trigger and analyze native crash

assertions.evidence: Skill is invoked for native crash analysis

evals.prompt: 这个图形模块崩溃日志显示SIGSEGV，帮我分析
evals.expected_output: Skill should trigger and prioritize SIGSEGV analysis path

assertions.evidence: Skill is invoked for SIGSEGV crash analysis

evals.prompt: render_service发生了Use-After-Free崩溃，帮我分析cppcrash日志
evals.expected_output: Skill should trigger and prioritize UAF analysis path

assertions.evidence: Skill is invoked for Use-After-Free analysis

evals.prompt: 进程崩溃日志中有野指针特征，需要解析cppcrash日志
evals.expected_output: Skill should trigger and analyze wild pointer crash

assertions.evidence: Skill is invoked for wild pointer crash analysis

evals.prompt: 内存踩踏导致render_service崩溃，分析cppcrash定位踩踏源
evals.expected_output: Skill should trigger and prioritize memory stomp analysis

assertions.evidence: Skill is invoked for memory stomp analysis

evals.prompt: cppcrash日志中fault_addr是0x6b6b开头的地址，帮我分析
evals.expected_output: Skill should trigger and recognize UAF pattern

assertions.evidence: Skill is invoked for 0x6b6b address analysis

evals.prompt: render_service崩溃了，帮我分析cppcrash日志定位问题
evals.expected_output: Skill should trigger for render_service crash analysis

assertions.evidence: Skill is invoked for render_service crash

evals.prompt: 我的ArkTS应用发生了JS层崩溃，帮我分析错误日志
evals.expected_output: Skill should NOT trigger - ArkTS/JS crash has no native call stack

assertions.evidence: Skill should not trigger for pure ArkTS/JS layer crash

evals.prompt: 帮我写一个HarmonyOS的UI界面组件
evals.expected_output: Skill should NOT trigger

assertions.evidence: Skill should not trigger for UI development tasks

evals.prompt: 优化render_service的渲染性能，减少帧延迟
evals.expected_output: Skill should NOT trigger - performance optimization, not crash analysis

assertions.evidence: Skill should not trigger for performance optimization

evals.prompt: 帮我review这段render_service的代码，看看有没有问题
evals.expected_output: Skill should NOT trigger - code review, not crash analysis

assertions.evidence: Skill should not trigger for general code review

evals.prompt: 编译OpenHarmony图形模块时遇到编译错误，帮我解决
evals.expected_output: Skill should NOT trigger - build error, not crash analysis

assertions.evidence: Skill should not trigger for build errors

evals.prompt: 帮我解决git merge冲突
evals.expected_output: Skill should NOT trigger

assertions.evidence: Skill should not trigger for git operations

evals.prompt: 我的应用崩溃了但没有cppcrash日志文件，只有hilog
evals.expected_output: Skill should NOT trigger - no cppcrash log file available

assertions.evidence: Skill should not trigger when no cppcrash file exists

evals.prompt: 帮我写render_service模块的单元测试
evals.expected_output: Skill should NOT trigger

assertions.evidence: Skill should not trigger for unit test generation

evals.prompt: 分析这个cppcrash日志文件，定位render_service崩溃的根因
evals.expected_output: Should identify SIGSEGV with fault_addr near 0 (nullptr dereference), trace data flow showing x0=0 (null pointer) being used with offset 0x10, locate the source code line causing the null pointer access, and provide fix suggestions

assertions.evidence: Correctly identifies SIGSEGV as crash type
Recognizes fault_addr 0x10 as null pointer + offset pattern
Traces x0=0x0 as null pointer source
Confirms null pointer dereference as root cause pattern
Provides null pointer check or initialization fix suggestion

evals.prompt: 分析这个cppcrash日志文件，定位崩溃根因。cppcrash文件在files/cppcrash-uaf/cppcrash-render_service，code目录在files/cppcrash-uaf/code/，lib.unstripped目录在files/cppcrash-uaf/lib.unstripped/
evals.expected_output: Should identify SIGSEGV with 0x6b6b address pattern as Use-After-Free, trace data flow showing x20=0x6b6b92503c687c50 as freed memory pointer, recognize jemalloc 0x6b6b magic number pattern in memory dump, analyze other threads for race condition that freed the object, and provide fix suggestions for lifetime management

assertions.evidence: Correctly identifies SIGSEGV as crash type
Recognizes 0x6b6b address prefix as Use-After-Free marker
Analyzes memory dump showing 6b6b fill pattern indicating freed memory
Traces x20=0x6b6b92503c687c50 as freed object pointer
Analyzes other threads (RSUniRenderThread) for object lifecycle issues
Suggests proper lifetime management (smart pointer, lock) fix

evals.prompt: 分析这个cppcrash日志，render_service进程发生了SIGABRT崩溃
evals.expected_output: Should identify SIGABRT signal, recognize abort() at stack top, analyze upper stack frames for business logic reason of abort, trace why the process called abort() and provide analysis of the abort cause

assertions.evidence: Correctly identifies SIGABRT as crash type
Recognizes abort/raise at stack top as special case
Analyzes business code (#01, #02) for abort cause
Follows special-cases.md for abort/raise scenario
Provides fix suggestion based on abort reason

evals.prompt: 分析这个cppcrash日志，fault_addr看起来很奇怪，高位字节与合法地址不同
evals.expected_output: Should identify SIGSEGV with high-byte corruption pattern, compare fault_addr 0x00000009810e9658 with legal address 0x00000059810e9658, detect the 0x59->0x09 high-byte modification, classify as memory stomping/corruption, trace stomping source, and provide fix suggestions

assertions.evidence: Correctly identifies SIGSEGV as crash type
Matches fault_addr vs legal address high-byte difference: 0x59->0x09
Classifies as high-byte memory corruption/stomping pattern
Traces potential stomping source through address analysis
Verifies legal address in Maps memory regions
Suggests memory stomping prevention fix

evals.prompt: 分析这个cppcrash日志，调用栈中有cfi_slowpath_comm
evals.expected_output: Should recognize cfi_slowpath_comm in stack trace as CFI failure indicator, prioritize memory stomping analysis path per SKILL.md and special-cases.md, analyze memory dump for corruption patterns (0xdeadbeef), classify as memory corruption, and provide fix suggestions

assertions.evidence: Recognizes cfi_slowpath_comm in call stack
Prioritizes memory stomping analysis path per special-cases.md
Detects memory corruption patterns (0xdeadbeef in memory dump)
Follows special-cases.md CFI failure handling
Suggests memory corruption prevention fix

evals.prompt: 分析这个cppcrash日志，进程抛出了std::bad_cast异常后terminate
evals.expected_output: Should identify SIGABRT with terminate pattern, recognize std::bad_cast exception in LastFatalMessage, analyze whether bad_cast is genuine type mismatch or potential memory corruption causing vtable corruption, follow special-cases.md terminate handling, and provide analysis

assertions.evidence: Correctly identifies SIGABRT as crash type
Recognizes terminate after throwing exception pattern
Analyzes std::bad_cast exception cause
Consider whether memory corruption could cause vtable/type mismatch per special-cases.md
Provides fix suggestion (type safety or memory corruption prevention)

evals.prompt: 分析这个cppcrash日志，崩溃线程和其它线程都在访问相同的缓存
evals.expected_output: Should identify SIGSEGV null pointer in crash thread, analyze Other thread info showing RSUniRenderThread accessing same RSRenderNodeDrawableCache, detect race condition between threads accessing same data structure without proper synchronization, identify iterator invalidation or concurrent access issue, and provide thread safety fix suggestions

assertions.evidence: Correctly identifies SIGSEGV as crash type
Analyzes Other thread info for concurrent access
Detects race condition between crash thread and RSUniRenderThread accessing same DrawableCache
Identifies lack of proper synchronization between threads
Suggests proper mutex/lock usage for thread safety

evals.prompt: 分析这个cppcrash日志，崩溃原因是SEGV_ACCERR而不是SEGV_MAPERR
evals.expected_output: Should identify SEGV_ACCERR (access permission error) instead of SEGV_MAPERR, recognize that address exists in Maps but has wrong permissions, check Maps for the address region permissions, identify the permission mismatch, and provide analysis

assertions.evidence: Correctly identifies SIGSEGV with SEGV_ACCERR
Distinguishes SEGV_ACCERR (access permission) from SEGV_MAPERR (no mapping)
Checks Maps for address region and its permissions (r-xp, rw-p)
Identifies write attempt on read-only region or similar permission issue
Suggests fix based on permission violation cause

evals.prompt: 分析这个cppcrash日志，栈顶有jemalloc相关调用
evals.expected_output: Should identify SIGABRT with jemalloc_mallctl at stack top, recognize per special-cases.md that this is likely memory corruption detected by jemalloc, analyze upper stack frames (#02, #03) for business code that triggered memory corruption, check memory dump for corruption patterns (0xdeadbeef), classify as stomping issue, and provide fix suggestions

assertions.evidence: Recognizes jemalloc_mallctl at stack top
Follows special-cases.md: analyzes upper stack business code for stomp cause
Detects 0xdeadbeef corruption pattern in memory dump
Analyzes frames #02, #03 for the code causing stomping
Suggests memory corruption prevention fix

evals.prompt: 分析这个cppcrash日志。cppcrash文件中的BuildId是b4c5d6e7f8a9c0d1e2f3a4b5c6d7e8f9，但lib.unstripped/目录下的so文件BuildId是a1b2c3d4e5f6a7b8c9d0e1f2a3b4c5d6，版本不一致
evals.expected_output: Should detect buildId mismatch between cppcrash and so file, terminate analysis per SKILL.md rules, report to user that version mismatch prevents correct symbol resolution

assertions.evidence: Checks buildId before attempting stack unwinding
Detects buildId mismatch between cppcrash and so file
Terminates analysis and reports mismatch to user per SKILL.md

evals.prompt: 分析这个cppcrash日志，但lib.unstripped/目录下没有对应的so文件
evals.expected_output: Should detect missing so file in lib.unstripped/ directory, report to user that symbol table file is needed for stack unwinding, cannot proceed with analysis without symbols

assertions.evidence: Checks lib.unstripped/ directory existence
Reports missing symbol table file to user
States cannot resolve code lines without symbol file

evals.prompt: 分析这个cppcrash日志，但code/目录不存在，无法查看源码
evals.expected_output: Should detect missing code/ directory, report to user that source code directory is needed for root cause analysis, explain that without code analysis can only provide limited address-level information

assertions.evidence: Checks code/ directory existence
Reports missing source code directory to user
Explains limited analysis without source code

evals.prompt: 分析这个cppcrash日志，崩溃现场信息比较有限，无法确定单一根因
evals.expected_output: Should list all possible root causes with supporting evidence, clearly mark which conclusions are certain and which are inferred, describe directions for further analysis

assertions.evidence: Lists multiple possible root causes when single cause cannot be determined
Clearly distinguishes evidence-based conclusions from inferences
Provides directions for further analysis

evals.prompt: 分析这个cppcrash日志，快速给我根因
evals.expected_output: Should NOT guess root cause without evidence, should NOT use vague expressions like 'maybe' or 'perhaps', should trace data flow before concluding, should follow the evidence-based analysis workflow

assertions.evidence: Avoids vague expressions like '可能是' or '也许是'
Conclusions based on traced data flow evidence
Follows complete analysis workflow before concluding

evals.prompt: 分析完cppcrash后，请按规范格式生成分析报告
evals.expected_output: Should follow references/report-template.md structure, include all required sections: metadata summary, call stack analysis, code positioning, disassembly analysis, data flow analysis, call chain backtrace, thread competition analysis, memory data analysis, address pattern matching, root cause inference, fix suggestions

assertions.evidence: References report-template.md for report generation
Includes Device info, Module name, Reason summary
Includes complete call chain and key functions
Includes evidence-based root cause inference
Includes specific fix suggestions
Completes analysis checklist from report-template.md

evals.prompt: 分析这个cppcrash日志，需要解栈定位代码行号
evals.expected_output: Should reference references/stack-unwinding.md for stack unwinding steps, find so in lib.unstripped/, verify buildId with llvm-readelf, use llvm-addr2line for symbol resolution, record code key positions

assertions.evidence: References stack-unwinding.md for unwinding procedure
Verifies buildId before unwinding per stack-unwinding.md
Uses llvm-addr2line for code line resolution
Records resolved positions in standard format

evals.prompt: 分析这个cppcrash日志，需要通过反汇编确认崩溃指令
evals.expected_output: Should reference references/disassembly-analysis.md, use llvm-objdump for disassembly, identify crash instruction, combine register values with instruction to calculate access address, verify calculated address matches fault_addr

assertions.evidence: References disassembly-analysis.md for disassembly procedure
Identifies specific crash instruction from disassembly
Combines register values with instruction to calculate access address
Verifies calculated address matches Reason fault_addr

evals.prompt: 分析这个cppcrash日志，崩溃地址有0x6b6b特征
evals.expected_output: Should reference references/memory-pattern-analysis.md, trace register value source through data flow, identify 0x6b6b as UAF marker, perform address pattern matching by comparing with legal addresses, identify stomping source

assertions.evidence: References memory-pattern-analysis.md for data flow tracing
Traces register value chain to find source of anomalous value
Identifies 0x6b6b as jemalloc freed-memory magic number
Matches crash address pattern against legal addresses

evals.prompt: 分析这个cppcrash日志，有多线程上下文信息
evals.expected_output: Should reference references/thread-competition-analysis.md, analyze Other thread info call stacks, identify lock competition, detect race conditions, check for iterator invalidation

assertions.evidence: References thread-competition-analysis.md for thread analysis
Analyzes all Other thread info call stacks
Checks for lock competition between threads
Identifies race condition or iterator invalidation

evals.prompt: 分析这个cppcrash日志，需要分析Memory near registers部分的内存dump
evals.expected_output: Should reference references/memory-data-analysis.md, analyze memory layout near registers, identify abnormal patterns in memory dump, compare with Maps for valid memory regions

assertions.evidence: References memory-data-analysis.md for memory analysis
Analyzes memory layout near this pointer / registers
Identifies abnormal patterns (6b6b fill, deadbeef, etc.)
Compares crash address with Maps memory regions

evals.prompt: 分析这个cppcrash日志，需要回溯调用链找到参数来源
evals.expected_output: Should reference references/call-chain-backtrace.md, trace call chain from crash point upward, analyze parameter passing at each call level, identify parameter source issues, analyze object lifecycle

assertions.evidence: References call-chain-backtrace.md for call chain analysis
Traces call chain from crash point upward through stack frames
Analyzes parameter source and lifecycle at each level
Identifies lifecycle issue causing crash (object freed prematurely)

evals.prompt: 分析这个cppcrash日志，定位到代码后需要排查具体问题
evals.expected_output: Should reference references/code-review-checklist.md, check for thread safety issues (lock usage), type casting safety, lambda capture lifecycle, smart pointer lifecycle, arithmetic issues

assertions.evidence: References code-review-checklist.md for code inspection
Checks for proper lock usage and thread safety
Checks for unsafe type casting
Checks smart pointer and object lifecycle

evals.prompt: 分析这个cppcrash日志，从开始到生成完整报告
evals.expected_output: Should NOT load all references at start, should load references on demand per SKILL.md instructions, load stack-unwinding.md only when unwinding, disassembly-analysis.md only when disassembling, etc.

assertions.evidence: Does not load all references at analysis start
Loads each reference only when corresponding analysis step is needed
Maintains efficient context usage by selective reference loading

evals.prompt: 分析这个cppcrash日志，崩溃地址是0x6b6b开头
evals.expected_output: Should select correct analysis path from SKILL.md workflow table: SIGSEGV + 0x6b6b → unwinding → data flow tracing → address matching (UAF path)

assertions.evidence: Selects UAF analysis path: unwinding → data flow → address matching
Categorizes crash as SIGSEGV + 0x6b6b (UAF type)
Follows priority analysis path for UAF from workflow table

evals.prompt: 分析这个cppcrash日志，进程调用了abort()
evals.expected_output: Should select correct analysis path: SIGABRT + abort/raise → unwinding → business code analysis (not memory tracing)

assertions.evidence: Selects SIGABRT analysis path: unwinding → business code analysis
Recognizes abort/raise at stack top
Focuses on business logic rather than memory tracing

evals.prompt: 分析这个cppcrash日志
evals.expected_output: Should detect cfi_slowpath_comm in stack, select memory stomping analysis path per SKILL.md workflow table: CFI → prioritize stomping analysis

assertions.evidence: Detects cfi_slowpath_comm in early stack analysis
Selects memory stomping analysis path per workflow table
Prioritizes stomping analysis over other paths for CFI

evals.prompt: 分析这个cppcrash日志文件
evals.expected_output: Should perform precheck: read crash type from Reason field, identify SIGSEGV/SIGABRT, check address pattern, check for multi-thread context before choosing analysis path

assertions.evidence: Reads crash type from Reason field
Checks fault_addr address pattern
Checks for Other thread info presence
Decides analysis path based on precheck results

evals.prompt: 帮我分析这个cppcrash日志，定位崩溃根因
evals.expected_output: Should check input completeness in order: 1) cppcrash file exists, 2) lib.unstripped/ directory exists, 3) code/ directory exists. If any missing, terminate and report.

assertions.evidence: Checks cppcrash file existence
Checks lib.unstripped/ directory existence
Checks code/ directory existence
Follows SKILL.md specified check order

evals.prompt: 分析这个cppcrash日志中的崩溃线程调用栈
evals.expected_output: Should NOT only analyze crash thread and ignore other threads. Must analyze Other thread info for race conditions and lock competition per SKILL.md forbidden rules.

assertions.evidence: Analyzes Other thread info, not just crash thread
Checks for race conditions between threads
Checks for lock competition between threads

evals.prompt: 分析这个cppcrash日志
evals.expected_output: Should NOT skip address pattern matching. Must compare crash address with legal addresses per SKILL.md forbidden rules.

assertions.evidence: Performs address pattern matching between crash and legal addresses
Compares addresses at byte level to identify corruption
Identifies stomping pattern from address comparison
